title: Search Query DSL
description: Defines the root JSON DSL document used to execute a search: the query that is translated to Apache Solr or Elasticsearch, the fields to project, the result size, and optional aggregations.

query.description: Required search query to translate and execute.

fields.description: Required field names to project in the response.

items.description: A logical root document field name.

size.description: Optional maximum number of results to return per backend.

aggs.description: Optional named facets/aggregations over root document fields, computed per backend.

SearchQuery.description: Describes a search query before it is translated to Apache Solr or Elasticsearch.

id.description: Optional randomly generated identifier for this query instance.

name.description: Required human-readable query name used in logs and diagnostics.

materialTypes.description: Required list of source or material types to fetch data from.

items.description: A source or material type identifier.

Aggregations.description: Named aggregations; each key is the aggregation name echoed back in the response.

Aggregation.description: A single named facet/aggregation over a root document field.

TermsAggregation.description: Top-N distinct values of a root document field with counts.

field.description: Root document field to facet on.

size.description: Optional maximum number of buckets to return.

UniqueAggregation.description: Count of distinct values of a root document field.

field.description: Root document field to count distinct values of.

RangeAggregation.description: Histogram of a numeric root document field, bucketed by a fixed interval between bounds.

field.description: Numeric root document field to facet on.

from.description: Inclusive lower bound of the first bucket.

to.description: Upper bound of the last bucket; must be greater than 'from'.

SubfacetsAggregation.description: A facet with one named sub-facet per filter; each filter is a query DSL payload applied to the given root document field.

field.description: Root document field the filters apply to.

filters.description: Named filters in query DSL payload syntax; each becomes a sub-facet with the given name.

FilterAggregation.description: A single-bucket facet counting documents that match a query; the query nodes are combined with a must (AND) relationship.

query.description: Query DSL nodes combined with a must (AND) relationship.

QueryNode.description: A recursive query node. A node with an empty field is a boolean/group node; if the field is equal to the name of a document type in the mapping, then the sub-queries in 'data' query the fields in the specified document type; if 'field' is empty, then the node is a leaf field query.
QueryNode.$comment: The field value determines the shape of data and whether bool/mm are allowed.

field.description: Field to query. If empty or equal to the name of a document type, then the 'data' field is expected to be an array of clause objects, representing a boolean relationship of sub-queries or a nested query.

minimumMatch.description: Required amount of 'should' clauses that should match. Only allowed when 'field' is empty or equal to a document type name.

bool.description: How this node combines with its sibling clauses inside a boolean 'data' array: 'should' (OR), 'must' (AND), or 'mustNot' (negation). Required on every clause of a boolean node; ignored on the root node.

data.description: When 'field' is not empty, contains an object representing the query payload to match on the specified field. When 'field' is empty or equal to the name of a document type, contains an array of clause objects representing a boolean sub-query. Each clause is a query node tagged with a 'bool' of 'should', 'must', or 'mustNot', and the clauses are grouped by that tag. In the case of a nested query (when 'field' is equal to the name of a document type), the grouped clauses must match on the same child document.

then.$comment: Boolean query - contains an array of clause objects, each a query node tagged with a 'bool' of 'should', 'must', or 'mustNot'.

else.$comment: Leaf query when 'field' names a leaf field, or a boolean/nested sub-query when 'field' names a subdocument type.

data.description: Payload for the field query, or an array of clause objects representing a boolean/nested sub-query when 'field' names a subdocument type.

BooleanQueryData.description: Clauses for this boolean query; each is a query node tagged with a 'bool' of 'should', 'must', or 'mustNot'.

QueryPayload.description: Payload for a leaf field query.

PrefixQuery.description: Prefix query payload matching documents whose field value starts with the given prefix.

prefix.description: The prefix the field value must start with.

ExistsQuery.description: Exists query payload matching documents where the field has any value.

TextQuery.description: Text query payload for matching string or free-text fields.

phrases.description: Phrases to match. Each item is discriminated by 'type': a 'phrase' is matched with the field query parser; a 'capsule' is a Solr-only value resolved to an external krembox endpoint.

isExact.description: When true, morphology is not applied to this phrase even if the query specifies a morphology.

value.description: A Solr-only capsule value of the form '{endpointType}_{id}'. The endpointType is resolved to a krembox URL via configuration.

morphology.description: Optional morphology name; routes the query to the field's configured morphology destination field instead of its default destinationField.

RangeQuery.description: Range query payload for matching either numeric values or datetime/timestamp values within bounds.

ExactQuery.description: Exact query payload for matching numeric, datetime/timestamp, or boolean values.

NumericExactQuery.description: Exact query payload for matching one or more numeric values.

DatetimeExactQuery.description: Exact query payload for matching one or more datetime or timestamp values.

values.description: Datetime or timestamp values to match exactly.

BooleanExactQuery.description: Exact query payload for matching one or more boolean values.

NumericRangeQuery.description: Range query payload for matching numeric values within bounds.

DatetimeRangeQuery.description: Range query payload for matching datetime or timestamp values within bounds.
